idiom: qui voler un œuf voler un bœuf
french_text: hier vous ignoriez son existence qui vole un œuf vole un bœuf
english_reference: let a man steal an egg tomorrow he'll steal an ox
generated_translation: Yesterday you were unaware of his existence which steals an egg steals a cow.

idiom: qui voler un œuf voler un bœuf
french_text: qui vole un œuf vole un bœuf après la pluie le beau temps
english_reference: half a loaf of bread is better than none
generated_translation: Whoever steals an egg will steal a bull after fair weather comes.

idiom: qui voler un œuf voler un bœuf
french_text: qui vole un oeuf vole un boeuf
english_reference: a bird in the hand's worth two in the bush
generated_translation: He who steals a chicken will steal an ox.
